accepted_option.summary: Use Backboard as the product-facing name for the local review surface.
accepted_option.rationale: The implementation name KOB Webview remains technical, while Backboard describes the human review surface.

rejected_options.summary: Use Ark Console as the Backboard UI name.
rejected_options.reason: Ark Console is a separate execution admission surface and must not be confused with Backboard.

revisit_condition.summary: Revisit if Backboard gains write or execution controls.
